content.problemStatement:
"I'm a fan of anything that tries to replace actual human contact." - Sheldon.

After years of hard work, Sheldon was finally able to develop a formula which would diminish the real human contact.

He found kkk integers n1,n2...nkn_1,n_2...n_kn1‚Äã,n2‚Äã...nk‚Äã . Also he found that if he could minimize the value of mmm such that  ‚àëi=1k\sum_{i=1}^k‚àëi=1k‚ÄãnnniiiCCCmmmiii is even, where mmm = \sum_{i=1}^k$$m_i, he would finish the real human contact.

Since Sheldon is busy choosing between PS-4 and XBOX-ONE, he want you to help him to calculate the minimum value of mmm.

###Input:


The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The
description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer kkk.
Next line contains k space separated integers n1,n2...nkn_1,n_2...n_kn1‚Äã,n2‚Äã...nk‚Äã .
###Output:

For each test case output the minimum value of m for which ‚àëi=1k\sum_{i=1}^k‚àëi=1k‚ÄãnnniiiCCCmmmiii is even, where  mmm=m1m_1m1‚Äã+m2m_2m2‚Äã+. . . mkm_kmk‚Äã   and  000 <= mim_imi‚Äã<= nin_ini‚Äã .  If no such answer exists print -1.

###Constraints


1‚â§T‚â§10001 \leq T \leq 10001‚â§T‚â§1000
1‚â§k‚â§10001 \leq k \leq 10001‚â§k‚â§1000
1‚â§ni‚â§101 \leq n_i \leq 101‚â§ni‚Äã‚â§10181818
